_note: SOURCE OF TRUTH: The separate files (luxy_ride_audiences.json, luxy_ride_creatives.json, etc.) are canonical. Inline audiences/creatives in this file are for submission convenience only. Edit the separate files first.

meta.generated_by: INFORMATIV Unified Inferential System v36 (BONG + DiagnosticReasoner + Trilateral Resonance)

system_capabilities.bong_posteriors: Multivariate Gaussian (rank-13 diagonal+low-rank) replacing independent Betas. Captures cross-dimension correlations. Calibrated from 200K bilateral edges (correction factor 1.302 applied).
system_capabilities.diagnostic_reasoner: 5-hypothesis deduction engine. Each non-conversion is diagnosed as: H1 wrong page, H2 wrong mechanism, H3 wrong stage, H4 PKM/reactance, H5 fatigue. Next move selected by constraint-based reasoning, not statistical averaging.
system_capabilities.trilateral_resonance: R(buyer, seller, page) with epistemic bonus. Pages that resolve buyer uncertainty get higher resonance. Three-source epistemic: buyer + page×mechanism + buyer×page.
system_capabilities.per_touch_page_targeting: Each touch prescribes WHERE (page mindstate cluster) not just WHAT (mechanism). Page prescription adapts per-user based on learned page×mechanism posteriors.
system_capabilities.counterfactual_learning: Each impression teaches about ALL candidate mechanisms via propensity-weighted imputation. Learning multiplier typically 2-4x.
system_capabilities.propagation_aware_barriers: Barrier diagnosis uses BONG conditional_shift() to find the dimension where intervention propagates the most total conversion lift through correlated dimensions.
system_capabilities.information_value_bidding: Bid = P(convert) × revenue + information_value. New buyers bid up for learning. BONG joint entropy replaces sum of Beta variances.
system_capabilities.within_subject_design: Each user's 7-touch sequence is a balanced incomplete block experiment. Design-effect weighting discounts correlated within-user observations.

stackadapt_account.note: These IDs are created in StackAdapt's platform. Replace placeholders before API submission.

targeting.setup_note: Target the Touch 1 Pool audience. Exclude all converters. No prior exclusion needed.

informativ_params.page_cluster_rationale: Social proof mechanism amplified by social page environment (resonance 0.95). Cold start: population ideal cluster.
informativ_params.diagnostic_plan: First touch — no prior outcome to diagnose. Population-level mechanism selection via Thompson Sampling.
informativ_params.if_ignored: DiagnosticReasoner evaluates H1-H5. If H1 (wrong page): same mechanism on analytical (polar opposite). If H2 (wrong mechanism): switch to evidence_proof.
informativ_params.if_clicked_no_convert: Direction confirmed. Escalate scaffold level. Check for secondary barrier.
informativ_params.if_converted: Emit crawl expansion signal for social pages matching this mindstate. Suppress further retargeting.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — All Site Visitors
audiences.pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fires on any page of luxyride.com
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Create retargeting audience pool using Universal Pixel. URL rule: contains 'luxyride.com'.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Pricing Page Visitors
audiences.pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fires on /pricing or /rates page
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Create retargeting audience. URL rule: contains '/pricing' OR contains '/rates'.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Booking Started (Not Completed)
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Create audience from Universal Pixel event. Event: booking_start. Exclude: booking_complete.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Multiple Visits (3+)
audiences.pixel_rule: Universal Pixel fire count >= 3 within 14 days
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Create frequency-based audience. Min visits: 3. Period: 14 days.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Converted (EXCLUDE FROM ALL)
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Create exclusion audience from booking_complete event. Apply to ALL campaigns.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Touch 1 Pool
audiences.pixel_rule: All site visitors who have NOT been served Touch 1
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Target: All Site Visitors audience. No prior touch exclusion.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Touch 2 Pool
audiences.pixel_rule: Served Touch 1 AND did NOT click/engage
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 1 served audience. Exclude: Touch 1 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Touch 3 Pool
audiences.pixel_rule: Served Touch 2 AND did NOT click/engage
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 2 served audience. Exclude: Touch 2 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Touch 4 Pool
audiences.pixel_rule: Served Touch 3 AND did NOT click/engage
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 3 served audience. Exclude: Touch 3 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

audiences.name: LUXY Ride — Touch 5 Pool
audiences.pixel_rule: Served Touch 4 AND did NOT click/engage
audiences.stackadapt_setup: Target: Touch 4 served audience. Exclude: Touch 4 clickers. Exclude: Converted.

creatives.name: LUXY Ride — careful_truster — Touch 1
creatives.headline_direction: Chapter 2 (Complication): Present the problem. The character faces the same negativity_block the prospect experiences. Build tension without resolution yet.
creatives.testimonial_matching: Select testimonial from someone who SHARES the prospect's psychology. Archetype: careful_truster. Barrier: negativity_block.

retargeting_rules.principle: Each retargeting touch deploys a DIFFERENT mechanism targeting the specific bilateral alignment gap. Standard retargeting repeats the same message. This system deploys a diagnostic intervention.
critical_rules: Do NOT use StackAdapt standard creative rotation
Each touch MUST use the specific creative mapped to that position
Set up as SEQUENTIAL campaigns with audience EXCLUSION rules
After conversion: IMMEDIATELY exclude from ALL retargeting
If CTR drops below 0.03% after 3 touches: pause 72 hours

dayparting.note: Adjust peak hours based on archetype behavior data after first week

reporting.informativ_hypothesis: Each subsequent touch should convert at a HIGHER rate than the previous. If touch N converts lower than touch N-1, the mechanism mapping is wrong for that archetype.
